description: Round-9: auto-calibrated FinalizerWatchdogController — force_after / stall_after dicts are derived at factory time from manual_graph traces in data/experiments/bench_round{7,8}_*. The P90 of successful manual_graph llm_calls per task_type is rounded up to give each task type an empirically-supported budget; new benchmarks need only a manual_graph reference run rather than a hand-tuned registry entry.

Round-12: frozen sim_pretrain_gnn_v6 + LoRA adapter (rank=4, ~164 trainable params) on the kind-logits head, trained on manual_graph traces from rounds 7-13. Tests whether a soft, learnable correction alone can close the round-13 quality gap to manual_graph (0.975 → 1.000 on YandexGPT).

Round-12: same as flybrain_sim_pretrain_lora but wrapped in the auto-calibrated FinalizerWatchdog (round-9). A/Bs whether the LoRA adapter and the hard watchdog scaffold compose, cancel, or one dominates.
